section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of type 2 diabetes and has been managing it with diet and exercise.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is past medical history and current self-management behavior, which are patient-reported historical/subjective elements rather than an assessment or diagnostic synthesis.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's father and mother both had their gallbladders taken out.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is family history information, which belongs in the subjective/history portion rather than in the clinician assessment section.
